INFOS.p: Converter: Add protocol link on defined BASE-VARIANT COMPARAM.
Converter: Improve Nissan identification (Add N1 to N4 format)
Converter: Convert all services into flat service
Improve Nissan identification (Add N1 to N4 format)
Convert all services into flat service
Improve Nissan identification (Add N1 to N4 format)
Convert all services into flat service

DESC.HISTORY: "Supported Writeable DIDs" correction (SID) / Add KWP2000/DiagOnCAN Spec A support.

INFOS.p: Support check V2
Autoident by Vdiag(UDS $F1A0)/ Supplier(UDS $F18A) / Soft(UDS $F194) / Version(UDS $F195)
Generate ODX-V with information from project.xml
Support KWP2000/DiagOnCAN Spec A

DESC.HISTORY: Change the allowed snapshot record number. Add ODX template information into RF file.
